While its legal name includes 'Manufacturing' and its business scope broadly claims the 'processing and manufacturing' of almost every conceivable hardware category (semiconductors, nano-materials, heavy mechanical equipment, and optical-mechanical-electrical products), its physical reality shatters this facade.
